title: Entranced Enchantments
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c274f143ece9fa3120f672bd87059b5c7c2ec64b_0.webp)
# Entranced Enchantments
Adds useful enchantments
- Wind Rush: Increases the speed of the happy ghast
- Reach: Increases the holder's reach.
- Swift Strike: Increases the holder's attack speed
- Step: Increases step height to one block
- Waypoint: gives the wearer a waypoint on the locator bar

Detailed information can be found on the [Wiki](https://codeberg.org/SageAxolotl/Sages-Packs/wiki/Entranced-Enchantments).
# Compatibility
- [**Penchant**](https://modrinth.com/project/BTORUTmf)
